name: Baked Apples (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and core the apples.
2. Make a shallow cut around each apple, one inch from the bottom of the fruit to prevent the skin from shrinking during cooking.
3. Place the apples in a glass baking dish or individual custard cups.
4. Add 1 tablespoon brown sugar and 1/2 tablespoon butter into the core of each apple.
5. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
6. Cover the apples with wax paper.
7. Microwave on High for 10 to 14 minutes, or until tender. Let stand, covered, for 3 minutes before serving.
For one apple, microwave in an individual custard cup or bowl for 2 to 3 minutes on High. For two apples, microwave for 3 to 4 minutes on High.
